mapper.insert: INSERT INTO cma_auto_charge_settings (user_id, is_enabled, source_account_ref, max_charge_per_tx) VALUES (#{userId}, #{isEnabled}, #{sourceAccountRef}, #{maxChargePerTx}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE is_enabled = #{isEnabled}, source_account_ref = #{sourceAccountRef}, max_charge_per_tx = #{maxChargePerTx}, updated_at = NOW()
